PLTF PRESENTS PRIMA FACIE CASE. COURT ORDERS JUDGMNT FOR PLTF AND AGAINST BOTH DEFTS. PLTF SUBMITTED PREPARED JUDGMNT. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PARTIES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARK MAGEE, DANIEL AKA DANIEL MCGEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 25 SYCAMORE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO $9,212.00 RENT, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,377.00, LEASE FORFEITED
